name: Abd al-Rahman ibn Urwa
title: Devoted Brother
shortDescription: Abdullah ibn Urwa's brother who fought shoulder to shoulder with him, with a heart full of love for the Ahl al-Bayt, defending Imam Hussain (AS) and was martyred.
fullStory:
Abd al-Rahman ibn Urwa al-Ghafari was the brave brother of Abdullah ibn Urwa. Like his brother, he was a chivalrous and sincere Shia from the Bani Ghafar clan. The love for the Ahl al-Bayt was so deeply rooted in the souls of these two brothers that they left all attachments and reached Karbala.

On the day of Ashura, Abd al-Rahman, along with his brother Abdullah, came to the presence of Imam Hussain (AS). Their crying and restlessness were not out of fear of death, but due to their intense love for the Imam and sorrow for his loneliness against the vast enemy army.

In the battlefield, Abd al-Rahman was the embodiment of zeal and brotherhood. He fought alongside Abdullah and recited war poetry: 'O people, we are the sons of Ghafar and have come to aid Hussain with sharp swords'.

He charged into the heart of the enemy with utmost bravery, and whenever his brother Abdullah faced danger, he made himself a shield for him. These two brothers displayed a lesson in coordination and sacrifice on the battlefield.

Finally, Abd al-Rahman, after inflicting heavy casualties on the enemy, fell to the ground alongside his brother Abdullah due to sustained injuries and attained the grace of martyrdom, immortalizing his name forever.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلى عَبْدِ الرَّحْمانِ بْنِ عُرْوَةَ الغِفارِيِّ...
quote: (From Ziyarat Nahiya:) Peace be upon Abd al-Rahman ibn Urwa al-Ghafari and his brother.
